positive: Minimalist geometric illustration of a majestic, stylized mountain range at sunrise, viewed through sharp, clean linework. The composition should be centered and highly symmetrical, featuring overlapping geometric shapes representing peaks and valleys. Use a limited, highly contrasting color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream/parchment white. The style should be retro-modern vector art with clean, solid silhouettes and crisp edges, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Include subtle negative space definition and a sense of depth achieved through layered geometric forms. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect for t-shirt printing.
